summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Tiny Faith Songs Contest landing page and registration system. All 14 user stories verified successfully. Backend APIs (health check, registration with validation) working correctly. Frontend UI (bilingual support, form validation, submission flow, mobile responsive) fully functional. Integration between frontend and backend confirmed with successful Drive folder creation and email notifications.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 with ok=true, service_account_present=true, folder_id='121rMtc6bwqBBARkwlpTch71WG1ESRVKN'
Backend: POST /api/register validation - correctly rejects missing consent (400)
Backend: POST /api/register validation - correctly rejects no songs (400)
Backend: POST /api/register validation - correctly rejects invalid email (400)
Backend: POST /api/register validation - correctly rejects invalid link (400)
Backend: POST /api/register success - creates Drive folder, sends email to Tiny.faith2025@gmail.com
US1: Hero section loads with Vietnamese banner (banner-horizontal-vi.jpg) and Vietnamese CTA 'Đăng ký ngay'
US2: Language toggle switches between VI/EN, banner swaps to banner-horizontal-en.jpg, CTA becomes 'Register Now'
US3: Hero CTA button scrolls to registration form section
US4: All sections render correctly (About, Timeline, Prizes, How-to, Criteria)
US5: Footer displays contact email Tiny.faith2025@gmail.com and YouTube link
US6: Registration form inputs (child name, parent name, email) working correctly
US7: Song mode tabs switch between 'Upload Video' and 'Paste Link' modes
US8: Form validation - submitting without consent shows error 'Vui lòng tích vào ô đồng ý để gửi bài dự thi.'
US9: Form validation - submitting with no songs shows error 'Vui lòng nộp ít nhất 01 bài hát.'
US10: Form validation - invalid email shows validation error
US11: Form validation - invalid link (https://example.com) shows error 'Link không hợp lệ. Hãy dùng link YouTube hoặc Google Drive.'
US12: Happy path submission - form submits successfully with valid YouTube link, progress bar shows 99%, success dialog appears with folder URL, close button works
US13: Mobile responsive (390x844) - mobile menu button opens/closes menu, poster section visible, registration form accessible
Integration: Frontend form submission creates real Google Drive folder and triggers email notification

success_percentage.integration: 100% (form submission, Drive folder creation, email notification working)
